prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on water (H₂O) performed at the DFT level, tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI) in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, single-point (not re-optimized at DFT level). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Results:
- HOMO (index 4): −8.6037183 eV
- LUMO (index 5): +0.33695037 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 8.9406687 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy)
- Total electronic energy: −76.462901 Eh (−2080.6615 eV / −47981.195 kcal/mol)

Koopmans-derived properties: vertical IP = 8.6037183 eV, vertical EA = −0.33695037 eV, electronegativity χ = 4.133384 eV, chemical hardness η = 4.4703343 eV, chemical softness S = 0.22369691 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index ω = 1.9109156 eV.

Method: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, single-point on user-supplied geometry. No warnings reported.
